case_title: WEBB, TALLEY VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,680.10 FILED BY WEBB, TALLEY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB, TALLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,617.32 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,667.32, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3234.63, AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
